  1. Main page
  2. Interior doors in enamel to buy in Moscow in the online store UNION
Back to the offices

Interior doors in enamel to buy in Moscow in the online store UNION

Create an interior with premium interior doors from UNION. Doors made with glossy or matte enamel finishes of various colors will become a real decoration of your house. Thanks to a hidden aluminum or standard wooden box with casings, each door looks elegant and stylish. The 60 mm thick canvas not only adds external massiveness, but also provides excellent sound insulation, creating an atmosphere of coziness and comfort.

Want to buy doors that emphasize the individuality of your interior and will last for many years? UNION offers a wide range of models and a rich choice of colors of doors in enamel.

You can buy or order doors in enamel in Moscow by phone using the order form below or go to one of the product cards.

Leave the application
Leave the application

* - mandatory field to be filled
